identity.canonical_title: If θ = 32/27, Then in a Vortex-on-a-Sphere Model: ω

theory.technical_interpretation: If θ = 32/27, Then in a Vortex-on-a-Sphere Model: ω is an algebraic definition, written ω = 2π θ = 2π · (32)/(27).. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from π, θ, defining ω. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Constructed as an algebraic definition from π, θ.
